title: Christmas Ornaments
description: Holiday brand collaborations: custom hand-painted Christmas ornaments. Unique corporate gifts and limited editions for festive campaigns.

details.task: Create unique Christmas ornaments with custom painting for holiday brand collaborations.
details.solution: Developed design concepts and produced a series of hand-painted ornaments featuring partner brands' visual identities.
details.result: The limited edition ornaments became a sought-after corporate gift and a key element of holiday displays.
